forecast-period.text: Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning frost near the Barossa Valley. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 40 km/h before tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending westerly before dawn then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Partly cloudy. Patches of morning frost in the east. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Patches of morning frost south of Hawker. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower north of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Patches of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the coast. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the east coast. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of morning frost south of Yunta. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Patches of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
